description:
Add custom content filters to the 'Magazine Child' child theme's functions.php using the 'the_content' filter. For single post pages, prepend the estimated reading time calculated at 200 words per minute, rounded up to the nearest whole minute (minimum 1 minute), in the format:

Estimated Reading Time: X min

. If a post belongs to the 'Health' category (slug: 'health'), append the following disclaimer to the end:

Disclaimer: This content is for informational purposes only and not substitute for professional medical advice.

. These injections must only appear on single post pages and must be implemented via code without installing plugins or manually editing post text.

metadata.disclaimer_text: Disclaimer: This content is for informational purposes only and not substitute for professional medical advice.
